nodes.label: AI as visual ideation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate substitute for human illustrator
nodes.grounding_span: the AI has came up with several really good ideas that have matched my vision

nodes.label: AI as efficiency booster in creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to creative labor and market quality
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have to spend as much time thinking because I have a teammate to help me

nodes.label: Privacy and security in AI use
nodes.label_negative: Risk of content theft via AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'd love to feel like I could just put a lot of my work into it without worrying about someone else accessing it

nodes.label: AI as creative collaborator with human control
nodes.grounding_span: I'm driving the decisions. We're going back and forth with ideas, but ultimately I am deciding

nodes.label: Creative vision realization
nodes.grounding_span: matched my vision of what I want this to look like

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it takes less time to switch gears or make changes

nodes.label: Security and trust in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: Guaranteed privacy would help a lot

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as visual ideation tool
nodes.grounding_span: the AI has came up with several really good ideas that have matched my vision

nodes.label: Concern about content theft and privacy
nodes.grounding_span: I'd love to feel like I could just put a lot of my work into it without worrying about someone else accessing it

nodes.label: Concern about market saturation with low-quality AI content
nodes.grounding_span: I only worry that a lot of JUNK will end up cluttering the market

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI use for video and series
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to be able to create entire works with images from creative outlines

nodes.label: Iterative visual refinement — uses AI to generate and then tweak images
nodes.grounding_span: I can sometimes work with a few images created by AI and manipulate those or make changes

nodes.label: Selective sharing — compartmentalizes work to protect intellectual property
nodes.grounding_span: I've not shared complete pieces of work for critique since then, and I don't do it on AI either
